mapper.select: WITH city_cte AS ( SELECT c.city_id, c.city, c.country_id, c.last_update, co.country AS country_name FROM city c JOIN country co ON c.country_id = co.country_id ) SELECT city_id, city, country_id, last_update FROM city_cte ORDER BY city
SELECT city_id, city, country_id, last_update FROM city WHERE country_id = #{countryId} ORDER BY city
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO city (city, country_id, last_update) VALUES (#{city}, #{countryId}, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now())) RETURNING city_id
mapper.update: UPDATE city SET city = #{city}, country_id = #{countryId}, last_update = now() WHERE city_id = #{cityId}
